reviewers.resolution: Replaced debianImage() with containerimages.DefaultImage(); unified runInContainer helper so all 6 Docker tests use it (previously zsh/fish inlined their own docker call)
Already addressed by pragmatic fix (containerimages); moved Docker tests to internal/hooks/integration_test.go and TestHookBash_UninstallRestores to install_test.go

Addressed by moving tests to correct package (resolving cross-package path dependency); runInContainer now calls t.Fatalf on non-zero docker exit instead of discarding error; added comment explaining set -e omission in RecursionGuard test
